pages.description: **Anthropic-compatible endpoint.**
pages.title: Create a Message

pages.description: Creates a custom evaluator for scoring model outputs. Evaluators use the [Eval Protocol](https://evalprotocol.io) to define test cases, run model inference, and score responses. They are used with evaluation jobs and Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT).
pages.title: Create Evaluator

pages.description: Deletes an evaluator and its associated versions and build artifacts.
pages.title: Delete Evaluator

pages.description: Deletes a model response by its ID. Once deleted, the response data will be gone immediately and permanently.
pages.title: Delete Response

pages.description: Returns a signed URL to download the evaluator's build logs. Useful for debugging `BUILD_FAILED` state.
pages.title: Get Evaluator Build Log Endpoint

pages.description: Returns a signed URL to download the evaluator's source code archive. Useful for debugging or reviewing the uploaded code.
pages.title: Get Evaluator Source Code Endpoint

pages.description: Returns signed URLs for uploading evaluator source code (**step 3** in the [Create Evaluator](/api-reference/create-evaluator) workflow). After receiving the signed URL, upload your `.tar.gz` archive using HTTP `PUT` with `Content-Type: application/octet-stream` header.
pages.title: Get Evaluator Upload Endpoint

pages.description: Retrieves an evaluator by name. Use this to monitor build progress after creation (**step 6** in the [Create Evaluator](/api-reference/create-evaluator) workflow).
pages.title: Get Evaluator

pages.description: Gets a single quota by resource name.
pages.title: Get Quota

pages.description: Retrieves a secret by name. Note that the `value` field is not returned in the response for security reasons. Only the `name` and `key_name` fields are included.
pages.title: Get Secret

pages.description: Lists all evaluators for an account with pagination support.
pages.title: List Evaluators

pages.description: Lists all quotas for an account.
pages.title: List Quotas

pages.description: Get a list of all responses for the authenticated account.
pages.title: List Responses

pages.description: Lists all secrets for an account. Note that the `value` field is not returned in the response for security reasons. Only the `name` and `key_name` fields are included for each secret.
pages.title: List Secrets

pages.description: Create a completion for the provided prompt and parameters.
pages.title: Create Chat Completion

pages.description: Create a completion for the provided prompt and parameters.
pages.title: Create Completion

pages.description: Creates a model response, optionally interacting with custom tools via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). This endpoint supports conversational continuation and streaming.
pages.title: Create Response

pages.description: Rerank documents for a query using relevance scoring
pages.title: Rerank documents

pages.description: Updates evaluator metadata (display_name, description, default_dataset). Changing `requirements` or `entry_point` triggers a rebuild. To upload new source code, set `prepare_code_upload: true` then follow the upload flow.
pages.title: Update Evaluator

pages.description: Updates a quota.
pages.title: Update Quota

pages.description: Provides a streamlined way to upload a dataset file in a single API request. This path can handle file sizes up to 150Mb. For larger file sizes use [Get Dataset Upload Endpoint](get-dataset-upload-endpoint).
pages.title: Upload Dataset Files

pages.description: Triggers server-side validation of the uploaded source code (**step 5** in the [Create Evaluator](/api-reference/create-evaluator) workflow). The server extracts and processes the archive, then builds the evaluator environment. Poll [Get Evaluator](/api-reference/get-evaluator) to monitor progress.
pages.title: Validate Evaluator Upload
